About me

Who I Am

I am a passionate MCA graduate and Data Analyst specializing in transforming raw data into actionable insights. With hands-on experience in Power BI, Excel, SQL, and Python, I build real-world dashboards across multiple business domains and thrive on solving complex data challenges.

Power BIPower Query ExcelDAXData Modeling

Heart Disease Analysis Dashboard

  • Built an interactive Power BI dashboard to analyze survival trends and identify major risk factors including hypertension, diabetes, smoking, and anaemia.
  • Performed data cleaning, data modeling, and DAX calculations to generate actionable clinical insights.
  • Visualized survival rate by age group and impact of lifestyle factors using dynamic charts.

Coffee Shop Sales Dashboard
